paragraphs: Salt & Crème is a microbakery in Mountlake Terrace, WA. Everything is made to order in one kitchen by one person.
The menu is small on purpose. Each cake takes time — real time — and that limits how many can go out each week. This isn't a limitation. It's the point.
The flavors lean Japanese: shiso, hōjicha, yuzu, black sesame. They're the ones that keep coming back to the table, the ones that feel specific rather than safe.
